overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a character in ancient Egyptian armor walking through a sunlit desert village with mud-brick buildings, hanging fabrics, and market stalls, eventually entering a narrow stone passage and emerging into an ancient courtyard.

scene_state.functional_zone: village street with hanging fabric awnings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the village street beneath hanging red fabrics

notable_agents.action: villager in white skirt walking toward the camera

entered.detail: traditional mud-brick structure with weathered orange and white walls
large terracotta storage vessels stacked near the building
red and orange cloth awnings strung across the street overhead
tall cylindrical tower rising above the village buildings
tall palm trees visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunlit village street lined with mud-brick buildings. Large clay pots sit beside a building on the left while colorful fabrics hang overhead. A villager approaches from the front, and a stone wall runs along the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: village center with market stalls and pedestrians

events.description: character turns left at the intersection to follow the path
child runs past the camera from right to left

agents.ego_description: turning left at the intersection and continuing through the busier village center

notable_agents.action: child running quickly past the camera

entered.detail: open-air stall with palm leaf thatching on wooden poles
rough timber framework supporting a building extension

segments.scene_description: The character turns left into a busier area of the village, passing by a thatched market stall on the left. A child runs past the camera, and the mud-brick buildings now appear on the right side as the character moves through the center.

scene_state.functional_zone: market area with wooden walkways and thatched roofs

events.description: ground surface changes from dirt to wooden planks as character enters the market walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along elevated wooden walkways through the market area

notable_agents.action: villager in blue dress walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: elevated path constructed from wooden planks and bamboo poles

segments.scene_description: The character walks along wooden plank walkways through a semi-covered market area. Thatched stalls line the left side while mud-brick buildings remain on the right. The ground is now entirely wooden decking, and villagers walk ahead in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow covered passage leading to ancient stone courtyard

events.description: character enters narrow covered passage with wooden ceiling and stone walls
character emerges from passage into open stone courtyard with ancient ruins

agents.ego_description: entering the narrow passage and emerging into the ancient courtyard, looking around the ruins

entered.detail: overhead covering of wooden beams and planks creating a tunnel effect
ancient stone block wall forming the left side of the passage
ancient stone block wall forming the right side of the passage
large weathered stone blocks and architectural remnants in the courtyard

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow covered passage with wooden ceilings and stone walls on both sides. After passing through the enclosed walkway, the scene opens into an ancient stone courtyard with large ruined blocks. The ground transitions from wooden planks to stone flooring.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit Egyptian village that gradually transitions from open mud-brick streets into a secluded stone courtyard. It begins by following a character along a bright village road lined with clay pots and colorful overhead fabrics, moving past a stone wall as a villager approaches. As the character turns left, the environment becomes more crowded, shifting past thatched market stalls and running children toward a semi-covered area. The scene then transitions onto wooden plank walkways where the ground changes from dirt to decking, leading the character through a bustling market lined with thatched roofs. Finally, the camera follows the character into a narrow, enclosed passage with wooden ceilings and stone walls before emerging into an expansive ancient courtyard filled with large ruined blocks and stone flooring.
